repos.description: Your data stays yours. DataGlow is a privacy-first, cross-platform data intelligence platform that runs entirely in your browser or on your desktop. Twenty validation layers. Domain packs for healthcare, finance, and retail, with more on the way. Zero upload. Zero server. Zero compromise.
repos.name: dataglow
